The '''''Vanguard''''' was a [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class gunship]] serving in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|navy]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], which fought in the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

The ''Vanguard'' was commanded by a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] named [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Inadi (captain)|Inadi]], and was assigned to [[Task Force Aster]], part of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]. Accompanying the task force [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] [[Indomitable (Majestic-class)|''Indomitable'']] in a patrol of part of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], the gunship encountered [[Yevetha]]n [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustships]] at the [[Battle of ILC-905]].

''Vanguard'' was initially assigned to flank the larger ''Indomitable'' during their pass through the [[ILC-905 system]], then ordered to ahead to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] beyond the horizon of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] known as [[Prildaz]], where the gunship's sensors detected the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] [[Black Nine]], along with the two defending warships ''[[Tholos]]'' and ''[[Rizaron]]'', and a recently docked Yevethan cargo vessel.

The ''Vanguard'' promptly came under fire from both Yevethan warships, with her shields weakening under the intense barrage from their [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. One of the gunship's own [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] misfired and exploded, and the particle shields collapsed under a missile salvo from ''Rizaron''.

The ''Indomitable'' entered the combat at this point, drawing away turbolaser fire from ''Tholos'', while two successive waves of [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter|K-wing]] bombers were dispatched to assist ''Vanguard'' against ''Rizaron''.

In an attempt to assist the K-wings, the ''Vanguard'' launched her remaining CM-9 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], but the midships battery malfunctioned, causing further damage to the gunship. The thrustship responded with a second missile salvo of her own. The first missile of this salvo took out three engines and the power in the gunship's aft section, and Captain Inadi ordered the crew to abandon ship, but moments later two more missiles impacted, destroying the bridge and causing a violent explosion.

The ''Vanguard'' disappeared from the sensors of the ''Indomitable'' and the accompanying New Republic fighters, and was eliminated from the battle.
